<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Array; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractFunctionCallUnwrapMutator; class UnwrapArrayColumn extends AbstractFunctionCallUnwrapMutator { public const SET = 'Array'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Unwraps `array_column` calls.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $a = array_column([['id' => 1], ['id' => 2]], 'id'); // [tl! remove] $a = [['id' => 1], ['id' => 2]]; // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function functionName(): string { return 'array_column'; } }
